hero.title: Study Smarter,
hero.subtitle: S'Techdy combines intelligent study planning with mood tracking to help you achieve academic success while maintaining your mental wellness.

trusted.text: Trusted by students from top universities worldwide

features.title: Everything You Need to Excel
features.subtitle: Powerful tools designed to optimize your study routine and support your wellbeing.

smartScheduling.title: Smart Scheduling
smartScheduling.description: Plan your study sessions with an intelligent calendar that adapts to your learning patterns and goals.

moodTracking.title: Mood Tracking
moodTracking.description: Monitor your emotional wellbeing and discover how it affects your study performance over time.

progressAnalytics.title: Progress Analytics
progressAnalytics.description: Track your learning journey with detailed insights and beautiful visualizations of your progress.

goalSetting.title: Goal Setting
goalSetting.description: Set achievable study goals and celebrate milestones as you work towards academic success.

timeManagement.title: Time Management
timeManagement.description: Master your time with study trackers and reminders that keep you focused and on schedule.

studySessions.title: Study Sessions
studySessions.description: Organize your subjects and track dedicated study time for each course or topic.

howItWorks.title: Get Started in 3 Simple Steps
howItWorks.subtitle: Begin your journey to better studying in just minutes.

step1.title: Create Your Account
step1.description: Sign up in seconds and set up your personalized study profile with your goals.

step2.title: Plan Your Schedule
step2.description: Add your subjects, set study times, and let S'Techdy help you build the perfect routine.

step3.title: Track & Improve
step3.description: Monitor your progress, check in on your mood, and watch your productivity soar.

testimonials.title: Loved by Students Worldwide
testimonials.subtitle: See what our community has to say about their S'Techdy experience.

testimonial1.text: "S'Techdy completely transformed how I approach studying. The mood tracking feature helped me understand my best study times."
testimonial1.name: Sarah Chen

testimonial2.text: "Finally, an app that understands that studying is not just about time, but about mental wellness too. Highly recommend!"
testimonial2.name: James Wilson

testimonial3.text: "The progress analytics are incredible. I can actually see how much I've improved over the semester. Game changer!"
testimonial3.name: Emily Rodriguez

about.title: About Us
about.missionText: At S'techdy, we're passionate about empowering students to plan smarter with the help of AI. Our mission is to transform the way students approach their academic journey by providing intelligent tools that make study planning more efficient, personalized, and effective.
about.connectText: Follow us on social media to stay updated with the latest features, study tips, and community highlights.

helpSupport.title: Help & Support
helpSupport.footer: We're here to help you study smarter

faq.a1: Navigate to the Calendar page and tap the '+' button to create a new study slot. You can set the subject, time, duration, and add notes for your study session.
faq.a2: Go to the login page and tap 'Forgot Password'. Enter your registered email address and we'll send you a link to reset your password.
faq.a3: Your data is automatically synced when you're logged into your account. Simply log in with the same credentials on any device to access your study plans.
faq.a4: When creating or editing a study slot, enable the reminder option and set your preferred notification time before the session starts.

pricing.title: Choose Your Plan
pricing.subtitle: Select the perfect plan for your study journey. Upgrade or downgrade at any time.

q1.question: Can I change my plan later?
q1.answer: Yes! You can upgrade or downgrade your plan at any time. Changes take effect immediately and we'll prorate any payments.

q2.question: Is there a free trial for paid plans?
q2.answer: All paid plans come with a 7-day free trial. No credit card required to start.

q3.question: What payment methods do you accept?
q3.answer: We accept all major credit cards, PayPal, and bank transfers. All payments are processed securely.

q4.question: Can I cancel my subscription?
q4.answer: You can cancel your subscription at any time. You'll continue to have access until the end of your billing period.

footer.helpText: Need help choosing? Contact us at

termsOfUse.title: Terms of Use
termsOfUse.subtitle: Please read these terms carefully before using S'Techdy
termsOfUse.introduction: Welcome to S'Techdy! These Terms of Use govern your use of our study planning and mood tracking application. By accessing or using S'Techdy, you agree to be bound by these terms.

acceptance.title: Acceptance of Terms
acceptance.content: By creating an account or using S'Techdy, you acknowledge that you have read, understood, and agree to be bound by these Terms of Use. If you do not agree to these terms, please do not use our services.

eligibility.title: Eligibility
eligibility.content: You must be at least 13 years old to use S'Techdy. If you are under 18, you must have parental or guardian consent to use our services. By using S'Techdy, you represent that you meet these eligibility requirements.

account.title: Account Responsibilities
account.content: You are responsible for maintaining the confidentiality of your account credentials and for all activities that occur under your account. Please use a strong password and notify us immediately of any unauthorized access.

usage.title: Acceptable Use
usage.content: You agree to use S'Techdy only for lawful purposes and in accordance with these terms. You may not misuse our services, attempt to gain unauthorized access, or interfere with other users' enjoyment of the platform.

intellectualProperty.title: Intellectual Property
intellectualProperty.content: All content, features, and functionality of S'Techdy, including but not limited to text, graphics, logos, and software, are owned by S'Techdy and are protected by copyright and other intellectual property laws.

privacy.title: Privacy & Data
privacy.content: Your privacy is important to us. Our collection and use of personal information is governed by our Privacy Policy. By using S'Techdy, you consent to our data practices as described in our Privacy Policy.

termination.title: Termination
termination.content: We reserve the right to suspend or terminate your account at any time for violations of these terms or for any other reason at our discretion. You may also delete your account at any time through your account settings.

disclaimer.title: Disclaimer of Warranties
disclaimer.content: S'Techdy is provided 'as is' without warranties of any kind. We do not guarantee that our services will be uninterrupted, error-free, or completely secure. Use our services at your own risk.

changes.title: Changes to Terms
changes.content: We may update these Terms of Use from time to time. We will notify you of any significant changes by posting the new terms on this page and updating the effective date. Continued use constitutes acceptance of the updated terms.

contact.title: Contact Us
contact.content: If you have any questions about these Terms of Use, please contact our legal team. We're here to help clarify any concerns you may have about your rights and responsibilities.

termsOfUse.footer: For questions about these terms, contact us at

quote.dailyMessage: A new quote every day to inspire you 🌟
